entry.title: IDC SAQMPD05C1103 (M130) awarded to DYNCORP INTERNATIONAL LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: BUREAU OF INTERNATIONAL NARCOTICS AND LAW ENFORCEMENT AFFAIRS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Fee is dependent on services required. Contact Patrick Murphy at 321-783-9860 x33163

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: DE-OBLIGATES OY3&OY4 FUNDING AND DEFINITIZES CONSTRUCTION PROPOSALS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
